data.text: Six years later. With the Driftmark succession suddenly critical, Rhaenyra attempts to strike a bargain with Rhaenys.

data.headline: E10 • The Black Queen
data.text: Mourning a tragic death, Rhaenyra tries to hold the kingdom together and Daemon prepares for war.
